semantic_summary: This table contains metadata about mobile applications listed on the Google Play Store. Each row represents a single app and includes the following details: the app's name (App), its category (Category), user rating (Rating), number of user reviews (Reviews), app size (Size), number of installs (Installs), whether the app is free or paid (Type), price (Price), content rating (Content Rating) indicating the appropriate audience, genres (Genres) describing the app's type or function, the date the app was last updated (Last Updated), the current version of the app (Current Ver), and the minimum Android version required to run the app (Android Ver). All columns are stored as text and are nullable, meaning some values may be missing. This table is useful for analyzing app characteristics, popularity, pricing, and compatibility.
